boundary_imports.reason: Existing upload validation dependency at FTY-200 baseline.
Existing worker ingestion dependency at FTY-200 baseline; re-homed from processing.py to persist.py in FTY-331 when the persistence layer (incl. _retain_label_image) was extracted.

FTY-376 terminal purge: the worker hard-deletes an event's transient image rows (purge_transient_for_event, the FTY-375 backend-core seam) in the same transaction as the terminal status write (estimation-jobs.md v6, log-attachments.md v3) — the FTY-358 pattern of an estimator step calling a backend-core service within the worker path.
Existing event transition dependency at FTY-200 baseline.
Existing clarification re-estimate dependency at FTY-200 baseline.
Existing label proposal source-type dependency at FTY-200 baseline.

FTY-307: the exact-evidence proposal read projection (serialize_proposal) reads the server-held ExactEvidenceProposal + shared cost_grams to build the ExactEvidenceProposalDTO, mirroring the label_proposal service depending on its estimator step.
FTY-307: the proposal preview scales the proposal's per-100g facts to the costed preview totals via the shared FTY-044 serving math (scale_facts).
Existing source diagnostics dependency at FTY-200 baseline.
Existing source diagnostics dependency at FTY-200 baseline.

Target override band reuses estimator Atwater constants; from the FTY-200 baseline (moved into the override_rules module by the FTY-202 target service decomposition).

FTY-308: the barcode exact-evidence propose service loads the owner-scoped item, checks exact-upgrade eligibility, and orchestrates the estimator generator/resolvers (cache-first OFF BarcodeResolver + identity fallback) to build and sign a proposal, mirroring the FTY-307 exact_evidence and label_proposal services depending on their estimator steps.

FTY-309: the shared exact-evidence service now hosts the owner-scoped food-item loader (load_owned_food_item), which raises the estimator re_match ItemNotFound for an unknown/cross-user item so both propose services render one fail-closed 404.
